title: Remove Damage Overlay
description: Removes hit color (tint) from all entities!
body:
## Remove Damage Overlay

This resource pack removes damage tint on all entities when they take damage.

### Versions: <FONT COLOR="#3598db">1.17</FONT> — <FONT COLOR="#ff39eb">1.21.11</FONT>

### Works with both <FONT COLOR="#e74c3c">**Optifine**</FONT> and <FONT COLOR="#2fcc71">**Sodium**</FONT>.
